text: I feel as though I am in a space balanced between rigid order and imaginative potential. The conference room, all glass and linearity, evokes a sense of anticipation and possibility, as if discussions held here decide the rules of an invisible game. The colorful R+D display channels another energy—it celebrates invention, hinting that boundaries exist to be questioned. Immersed in this interplay of transparency, order, and creative speculation, I feel quietly energized, aware of both my presence as an observer and my invitation to participate in the unfolding ideas.
